name: logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles tool
description: For logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles, inconsistent maintenance schedules cause unexpected breakdowns. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking of maintenance schedules.
problem_solved: Inconsistent vehicle maintenance schedules lead to unexpected breakdowns.
features: manual entry of vehicle maintenance records
weekly alert notifications for upcoming maintenance
